content: Most existing explorations treat Self-Refine as a one-dimensional single-path improvement framework and LLM self-reflection mechanisms as pure perspective-generation modules, but we can reframe Self-Refine as a structural scaffold that integrates multiple inconsistent reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to unlock a new multi-path self-improvement paradigm. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data, while solving its common limitation of getting stuck in local optimal output by drawing on inconsistent problem-solving perspectives from self-reflection mechanisms.
